## Story Overview

**Current Phase:** Implementation — Native TypeScript port of doc-sync agent to LangGraph node

**Objective:** Port the 7-phase doc-sync agent logic from the `.claude/skills/doc-sync/SKILL.md` contract to a native TypeScript LangGraph node at `packages/backend/orchestrator/src/nodes/sync/doc-sync.ts`.

**Dependencies (both UAT):**
- WINT-9010: Provides @repo/workflow-logic shared business logic
- WINT-0160: Hardened doc-sync agent and defined 7-phase LangGraph porting contract

**Key Deliverables:**
1. Native TypeScript implementation of 7-phase doc-sync contract
2. Full test coverage (13 acceptance criteria covering 7 phases)
3. Functionally equivalent outputs to subprocess-based fallback approach
4. Integration with node-factory and exports from orchestrator package

## Active Constraints

1. **Use Zod schemas for all types** — Never TypeScript interfaces (CLAUDE.md)
2. **No barrel files** — Import directly from source (CLAUDE.md)
3. **Use @repo/logger, not console** — Consistent logging (CLAUDE.md)
4. **Minimum 45% test coverage** — All new/modified code required
5. **Named exports preferred** — Direct imports from source files
6. **External API tolerance** — Git subprocess allowed in Phase 1 (file discovery)
7. **Performance considerations** — Sequential file processing acceptable for MVP

## Scope Summary

**Touches:**
- Backend: YES (LangGraph node implementation)
- Frontend: NO
- Packages: YES (orchestrator, workflow-logic — read-only)
- Database: NO
- Contracts: YES (DocSyncConfigSchema, DocSyncResultSchema)
- UI: NO
- Infra: NO
- External APIs: YES (git subprocess in Phase 1)

**Risk Areas:**
- Path decision (nodes/sync/ vs nodes/workflow/) — AUTO-RESOLVED to nodes/sync/
- Subprocess integrity — Native port must produce identical outputs
- Surgical edits in Phase 4 — Table row manipulation on dynamic doc structure
- Database graceful degradation — Phase 2 optional DB merge, Phase 7 reporting

## 7-Phase Implementation Map

| Phase | Name | File(s) | Test Coverage | AC Refs |
|-------|------|---------|---------------|---------|
| 1 | File Discovery | doc-sync.ts (Phase1) | git diff primary, timestamp fallback | AC-1, AC-2, AC-5 |
| 2 | Frontmatter Parsing | doc-sync.ts (Phase2) | file + optional DB merge | AC-4, AC-6, AC-7 |
| 3 | Section Mapping | doc-sync.ts (Phase3) | filename pattern → doc section | AC-5, AC-8 |
| 4 | Documentation Updates | doc-sync.ts (Phase4) | surgical table edits in docs/workflow/ | AC-9 |
| 5 | Mermaid Regeneration | doc-sync.ts (Phase5) | diagram generation with field parsing | AC-5 |
| 6 | Changelog Drafting | doc-sync.ts (Phase6) | version bump determination | AC-10 |
| 7 | SYNC-REPORT Generation | doc-sync.ts (Phase7) | structured output export | AC-11, AC-13 |

**Subtask Chain (Linear DAG):**
ST-1 → ST-2 → ST-3 → ST-4 → ST-5 → ST-6 → ST-7 → ST-8 (quality gates)
